name: Z.ai (Zhipu)
description: International brand for Zhipu AIs GLM-4/GLM-5 series developer API, the Tsinghua-spinoff LLM leader.

seo.title: Z.ai (Zhipu) — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Z.ai (Zhipu): International brand for Zhipu AIs GLM-4/GLM-5 series developer API, the Tsinghua-spinoff LLM leader.

when_to_use: Accessing Zhipu AI's GLM models for Chinese-language AI apps
Building agents with Zhipu's function calling and tool use API
Running multimodal GLM for image understanding and visual QA
Fine-tuning GLM models on proprietary enterprise datasets

pros: GLM-4 and GLM-5 are strong models
cons: English docs improving but still thin
review.verdict: Genuine frontier-tier Chinese LLM access, but weigh the sanctions and compliance exposure carefully.
review.best_for: Developers globally who want GLM-class reasoning at lower token costs
review.not_for: US federal, defense, and other teams blocked from Chinese-origin models
